title: Relation
description: A semantic relation between two named entities.

subject_id.description: entity_id of the subject entity from NER output

subject_text.description: Surface form of the subject for readability

predicate.description: Canonical predicate name (camelCase), e.g. locatedIn, worksFor

object_id.description: entity_id of the object entity from NER output

object_text.description: Surface form of the object for readability

evidence.description: Verbatim source text snippet supporting this relation
